title: Flintified
description: A curated list of modpacks recommended for skyblock!
body:
## FLINTIFIED

Flintified is a lightweight Minecraft modpack specifically designed for players running on low-end devices. It optimizes performance while still delivering a rich and enjoyable gameplay experience. By incorporating some of the most popular performance-enhancing mods, Flintified ensures that players can make the most out of their hardware without compromising on fun.


### Some of the popular mods Flintified ships with:

- Sodium
- Skyblocker
- Lithium
- Ferritecore


Everything is configurable in the modmenu :)
